response.justification: Nearly two decades of fullstack experience with strong alignment on the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production roles — plus current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, which directly matches the role's AI agent development requirement. Deep testing culture (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored testing libraries) and cloud/container experience round out the profile; the main gaps are Nest.js specifically and the Kotlin/Java secondary stack, where exposure appears dated or light.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js/React production experience across multiple companies
Current AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work matches a rare requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
Significant career time in niche DLang ecosystem rather than the role's stack
